name: Doodle Judge
description: Draw the daily prompt on a canvas; an AI judge scores it and ranks the gallery.
features: Finger-paint canvas for a shared daily drawing prompt
Submit uploads the drawing and asks ai.chat to score it 0-10 with a one-line reason
Scores feed an all-time artists leaderboard via a counter
Gallery of submissions sorted by score, each showing its grade and the AI's reason

collections.name: entries
collections.writtenWhen: the user submits a drawing and it is judged

counters.name: scores
counters.meaning: sum of a player's drawing scores

uses: grade a submitted drawing against a stated rubric and return a score plus a witty one-line reason

ui.layout: single card: canvas, controls, leaderboard, gallery

acceptance: Submit calls files.upload then ai.chat with the image and a 0-10 rubric prompt
The score is clamped 0-10 and stored with the AI's reason on the entry doc
The AI judges only the drawing artifact, never any person
Both the score and the reason are shown for each gallery entry
